start_message:
👋 Welcome to the text to fonts converter bot!

✨ This bot helps you transform your text into a variety of beautiful fonts.

📌 Please use the buttons below:
about_text:
🤖 Glyphify Fonts Text to Fonts Converter Bot

✨ This bot allows you to convert your text into more than 100 different font styles.

Features:
• ✍️ Convert text into various fonts
• 🌐 Supports Persian and English languages
• ⚡ Fast and completely free

Developer: @your_username
Channel: @your_channel

How to use:
1️⃣ Click the convert to font button
2️⃣ Enter your desired text
3️⃣ Receive the list of fonts

You can also use /start to restart the bot.
font_prompt:
📝 Please enter the text you want to convert into fonts:

💡 You can enter any text (Persian or English)
font_empty_error:
⚠️ Please enter a valid text.

🚫 Text cannot be empty.
font_more: ✨ {count} more fonts are available. Try again to see all.
font_error:
❌ Error generating fonts. Please try again.
Note: The text must include at least one Persian or English character.
unknown_command:
❓ Invalid command. Please use the menu buttons.
 /start
error: ⚠️ An error occurred. Please try again.
blocked: ⛔ You have been blocked from the bot for {duration} seconds due to spam.
